name: Neuroendocrine and Systemic Signal Reset Surveillance

scope.question: What changed for neuroendocrine and systemic signal reset since the 2026-06-02 public baseline publication?

summary: Ran a delta surveillance pass from the 2026-06-02 neuroendocrine-and-systemic-signal-reset publication through 2026-06-04. ClinicalTrials.gov still lists TRIIM-X as recruiting with no posted results and no unposted-results annotation. PubMed same-window surveillance found no TRIIM-X result paper or randomized human functional outcome. The closest new primary source was a Cell Metabolism S1PC/eNAMPT paper with aged-mouse muscle and frailty outcomes plus human circulating eNAMPT biomarker context; additional checks found recruiting klotho plasmid and klotho/follistatin gene-therapy registries with no posted results. These items do not justify a public outlook update by themselves, but they expose source-completeness gaps that should be handled as coverage repair before ordinary surveillance resumes.

materiality_decision.rationale: No checked source changes the current low-confidence human_biomarker_signal stage, mixed momentum, confidence, blockers, or rating-change criteria. The useful finding is that close but not-yet-curated S1PC/eNAMPT and klotho gene-therapy trial-watch records should be evaluated in coverage repair rather than converted into an ordinary surveillance bundle.

search_log.query: (TRIIM OR TRIIM-X OR "Thymus Regeneration" OR growth hormone DHEA metformin thymus OR epigenetic aging immunosenescence OR klotho OR oxytocin OR GnRH OR hypothalamic) AND (aging OR aged OR older adults OR rejuvenation OR epigenetic age OR immunosenescence), publication date 2026-06-02 to 2026-06-04
search_log.summary: Returned PMID 42230502, PMID 42227354, PMID 42102814, and PMID 41920173. PMID 42102814 was the closest track-relevant item; the others were context-only or wrong-scope for public update.

search_log.query: NCT04375657 OR TRIIM-X OR "Thymus Regeneration, Immunorestoration, and Insulin Mitigation Extension"
search_log.summary: Returned PMID 41994361, a broad 2026 review that cites TRIIM-style clinical modulation, not TRIIM-X results.
TRIIM-X remains recruiting, phase 2, estimated enrollment 85, estimated completion December 2025, last update posted 2025-05-07, and has no posted results or unposted-results annotation.

search_log.query: TRIIM OR thymus regeneration OR immunorestoration
search_log.summary: Returned TRIIM-X plus wrong-scope records. No additional TRIIM-style result-bearing aging trial was found.

search_log.query: epigenetic age AND (growth hormone OR DHEA OR thymus OR metformin)
search_log.summary: Returned recruiting no-results klotho plasmid and klotho/follistatin plasmid gene-therapy registries, plus TRIIM-X and other adjacent or wrong-scope records.

search_log.query: klotho, oxytocin, and GnRH aging searches
search_log.summary: Klotho searches surfaced no result-bearing aging intervention trial; oxytocin and GnRH searches mostly returned labor, reproductive, oncology, or disease records outside the track's aging-reset claim.

search_log.query: (S1PC OR "S-1-propenyl-L-cysteine" OR eNAMPT OR "extracellular nicotinamide phosphoribosyltransferase") AND (human OR clinical OR trial OR aging OR older adults)
search_log.summary: Confirmed PMID 42102814 as a close S1PC/eNAMPT hit but did not identify a posted human aging-function trial result for S1PC/eNAMPT.

excluded_sources.title: Thymus Regeneration, Immunorestoration, and Insulin Mitigation Extension Trial
excluded_sources.reason: TRIIM-X remains recruiting with no posted results and no unposted-results annotation; the no-results boundary was already public.

excluded_sources.title: Garlic-derived metabolite activates LKB1, promotes adipose eNAMPT secretion, and improves age-related muscle function via hypothalamic signaling.
excluded_sources.reason: Relevant aged-mouse functional and human circulating-biomarker context for adipose-hypothalamic systemic signaling, but not randomized human functional evidence. It should be evaluated in coverage repair before deciding whether to stage a public evidence-map or exclusion record.

excluded_sources.title: Safety and Efficacy of Injectable Klotho Plasmid Gene Therapy in Humans
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting non-placebo-controlled phase 1 pilot with serum alpha-klotho, FGF23/PTH/vitamin D/phosphate, renal biomarker, and adverse-event endpoints. It has no posted results and does not change the current stage.

excluded_sources.title: Safety and Efficacy of Klotho and Follistatin Gene Therapy
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting early phase 1 non-placebo-controlled pilot with serum alpha-klotho, follistatin, and adverse-event endpoints. It has no posted results and should be handled as trial-watch context during coverage repair.

excluded_sources.title: Ethylmethylhydroxypyridine Succinate Limits Inflammatory-Degenerative Changes in the Hypothalamus and Corrects Disturbances in the Circadian Rhythm of Corticosterone Secretion in Aged Rats.
excluded_sources.reason: Aged-rat hypothalamic and HPA-axis biomarker context, but short-course animal evidence with a distinct compound and no human aging endpoint.

excluded_sources.title: Aging reimagined: Bridging clinical modulation and scientific breakthroughs.
excluded_sources.reason: Broad review discussing clinical modulation including TRIIM, but it does not add primary TRIIM-X results or change the evidence map.

excluded_sources.title: Bone mineral density in adolescents and young women with hypogonadism: a DXA-based comparative analysis.
excluded_sources.reason: Hypogonadism bone-density analysis in adolescents and young women, not a systemic signal reset intervention for aging.

excluded_sources.title: TGF-beta Pathway-Based Polygenic Risk Score Modifies the Association between Red Meat Intake and Colorectal Cancer Risk.
excluded_sources.reason: Cancer-risk genetics and diet interaction, not a neuroendocrine or systemic signal reset aging intervention.

excluded_sources.title: Dysregulation of the Soluble alpha-Klotho-FGF23 Axis in Hashimoto's Thyroiditis: A Case-Control Study
excluded_sources.reason: Case-control Hashimoto's thyroiditis biomarker study, not an intervention and not a direct aging-reset trial.

notes: No candidate bundle was created because no post-publication source justifies a public outlook update.

The public track boundary remains unchanged: TRIIM is still the only staged human biomarker anchor, TRIIM-X remains no-results momentum, and animal/NHP signals remain heterogeneous plausibility rather than human functional benefit.
S1PC/eNAMPT and klotho gene-therapy registries are close enough that they should be handled through coverage repair instead of being buried in ordinary surveillance notes.
next_actions: Run coverage repair for neuroendocrine and systemic signal reset before ordinary surveillance resumes.
During repair, decide whether PMID 42102814, NCT07216781, and NCT07285629 should become public evidence-map, trial-watch, or explicit excluded-context records.
Keep TRIIM-X as the primary result-watch item and create a public update only if posted results or a peer-reviewed report changes the human biomarker, safety, or functional evidence boundary.
